sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4931" key="a(macokulisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁμαξο-κῠλιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κυλίνδω</etym>) <sense id="n4931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">down-roller</tr_> (i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">destroyer) of wagons:</tr_> in pl., name of a Megarian family, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.304e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
